summary: Semantic Salesforce control over Lightning pages and dashboards through the browser adapter plus an in-page helper.

commands.summary: Extract dashboard title, widgets, filters, layout, and visible health signals.
Extract Lightning report title, filter state, visible actions, and health signals from the current report view.
Apply a Lightning report filter action from inline shortcuts, dialog-backed picklists, or typed editor inputs and verify the new visible filter state.
Generate a structured usability and performance audit of the current dashboard.
Return currently available dashboard filters and selected values.
Set a dashboard filter value and verify resulting state changes.
Open dashboard edit mode and confirm editable state.
Reposition a dashboard widget in edit mode and verify new layout.
Save dashboard edits and confirm the page exits dirty state.

Deploy a Salesforce Report metadata file (.report-meta.xml) to a target org via `sf project deploy start`. Propose previews the sf argv + parses the report name/folder; apply shells out and captures the deploy id. Class-2 `deploy` side effect — Ghost Shift always refuses (deploy is in DANGEROUS_SIDE_EFFECTS).

Server-side portfolio audit: lists the user's dashboards, fetches per-dashboard widget->report mappings via /analytics/dashboards/<id>/describe, batch-SOQLs Report LastRunDate, and returns the cross-dashboard shared-reports + stale-reports aggregate. Zero DOM dependency — safe for overnight Ghost Shift lane.
